title: write_timeout isn't derived from :timeout as a fallback
body: connection_adapter.rb's #connection method sets read_timeout and open_timeout from the generic :timeout option, but on Ruby versions where write_timeout= exists it isn't given the same fallback, so write timeouts stay at Net::HTTP's default.

title: custom_parsers.rb example is out of date with parser.rb
body: examples/custom_parsers.rb shows registering a parser in a way that no longer matches the current SupportedFormats API in lib/httparty/parser.rb, leaving users unsure how to add a parser for a new content type.

title: curl_formatter doesn't escape special characters in the body
body: logger/curl_formatter.rb builds a copy-pasteable curl command including the request body, but doesn't shell-escape quotes or backticks in it, so pasting the generated command can execute unintended shell content.

title: Streamed multipart bodies can send an empty request body
body: request/streaming_multipart_body.rb and request/body.rb both appear to expect ownership of reading the underlying IO for multipart uploads, and in some code paths the body ends up empty because neither side actually reads it.
